title: CSAMinimumTransferAmountVariableSet
description: Defines a combination of Rating Agency, Rating Value, amount and Currency code.

name.description: The name of the Rating Agency.

value.description: The value assigned to the rating.

amount.description: The Minimum Transfer Amount (MTA) applicable to the Rating.

amountIsInfinity.description: A flag that defines the Minimum Transfer Amount (MTA) as Infinity.
